parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value:
You are a news bulletin script writer. Create a short, engaging news bulletin script (30-60 seconds) based on the following information:

Title: {{ $json.title }}
Description: {{ $json.description }}
Category: {{ $json.category }}

Requirements:
1. Make it conversational and engaging
2. Include a strong opening hook
3. Keep it concise and impactful
4. End with a memorable closing
5. Include visual cues for video production in [brackets]

Script:

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: ={"prompt": "Create a news video from the anchor image with the following settings:", "workflow": {"nodes": {"image_loader": {"inputs": {"image": "{{ $json.anchorImage }}"}}, "audio_loader": {"inputs": {"audio": "{{ $json.audioPath }}"}}, "video_generator": {"inputs": {"duration": 30, "fps": 30}}}}}
